<!--
  Thanks for contributing to puente!
  PR titles must follow Conventional Commits (e.g. "feat(routes): ...") — they're linted.
-->

## What does this PR do?

<!-- A clear description of the change and why it's needed. Link any related issue: "Closes #123". -->

## Type of change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (`fix:`)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (`feat:`)
- [ ] 📝 Docs (`docs:`)
- [ ] ♻️ Refactor / chore (`refactor:` / `chore:`)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change

## How was this tested?

<!--
  Describe what you ran. For tunnel/route/SSH changes, please confirm the end-to-end
  path against a real (or throwaway) Cloudflare zone — see CONTRIBUTING.md.
-->

## Checklist

- [ ] PR title follows [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes
- [ ] `pnpm build` passes
- [ ] I updated docs where relevant
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or personal hostnames are committed
